title: Isoxazoline derivatives and their uses in agriculture
abstract: Provided are isoxazoline derivatives and uses thereof in agriculture; in particular, provided a compound having formula (I), a stereoisomer, an N-oxide or a salt thereof, preparation methods thereof, and compositions containng these compounds and uses thereof in agriculture, particularly uses as active ingredients of herbicide for controlling unwanted plants; wherein R1, R2, R3, R4, n, R5, R6, Ra, Rb, Rc, Rd and Re are defined as described in the invention.
